name: /promote-standard accepts a source identifier and a section identifier as positional arguments
command: mkdir -p standards/snapshots && printf 'sections:\n  5.2.4: x\n' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/promote-standard.sh" owasp-asvs 5.2.4 --snapshot standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.yaml --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'source=owasp-asvs' out.txt && grep -q 'section_id=5.2.4' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
